india_trends.title: Tata Capital share price falls after Q4 results. Should you buy, sell or hold the Tata Group stock?
india_trends.summary: The Tata group’s non-banking finance company (NBFC), Tata Capital, reported a consolidated net profit of ₹1,502.02 crore for the fourth quarter of FY26, registering a growth of 42.8% from ₹1,051.70 crore in the same period last year.
